basics.name: Luiz Rodrigo Martins Barbosa
basics.label: Senior iOS Engineer · Swift · Functional Programming · TDD
basics.summary: Engineer with 23+ years across FinTech, MedTech, audio and marketplace apps. Grounded in functional programming and applied category theory — algebraic types, immutable state, side-effect isolation and composability — and applies these principles pragmatically to produce testable, maintainable and near-zero-defect code. Prolific open-source contributor, with libraries spanning reactive programming, hardware protocols and functional abstractions. Streamlined the full development cycle through LLM agents and deterministic code generators — from requirements to production-ready code, tests and pull requests.

work.summary: FinTech platform for automated savings and AI-driven investing, with a focus on subscription revenue growth

highlights: Feature development in the Subscriptions squad — the primary company revenue driver — delivering composable SwiftUI flows backed by TCA reducers, immutable state and explicit Combine-based effect pipelines
Championed functional programming across the iOS codebase: pure reducers, declarative UI, side-effect isolation and reactive pipelines — improving testability and all but eliminating regression bugs
Built a suite of Claude Code skills and agentic automations covering Jira management, Git workflows and code scaffolding, measurably accelerating delivery speed for the whole iOS team
Mentoring engineers and sharing expertise through internal talks and public tech-blog articles on iOS architecture, functional programming and TDD

work.summary: British MedTech company building Software as a Medical Device (SaMD) for remote patient monitoring

highlights: Technical leadership of 11 iOS engineers across multiple time zones — architectural reviews, coding standards and mentoring
Drove modularisation to enforce ownership boundaries and cut build times
Strengthened testing practices in compliance with SaMD regulatory requirements

work.summary: German multinational online food, grocery and goods delivery service

highlights: Managed nine engineers (Android, iOS, backend) across the Riders app domain, balancing delivery pace with technical health and individual growth
Code and architecture reviews across Swift, Kotlin, Go and Ruby — native mobile apps and AWS-hosted backend services
RFC/PRD authoring and review, feature design, technical grooming and cross-team dependency management

work.summary: Traditional German loudspeaker brand offering high-quality consumer audio products controlled via companion apps

highlights: Technical leadership of four engineers — code reviews, pair programming, mentoring, hiring and performance tracking

Architected all new iOS apps on a purely functional core: immutable state, complete side-effect isolation, declarative SwiftUI/Combine views and TCA/Redux reducers — delivered consistently on schedule with near-zero production crashes
Hardware integration with audio suppliers over Bluetooth/Bonjour/WAMP protocols; close collaboration with POs, PMs and UX/UI to shape new products
Built developer tooling to automate the full development workflow; introduced an open-source culture that produced widely reused GitHub libraries and became a hiring differentiator

work.summary: Platform for free, easy and local trades of goods and services — one of Germany's most-used apps

highlights: Feature development on one of Germany's top-ranked apps, serving millions of daily users across a large-scale classifieds marketplace
Adopted RxSwift and MVVM to decouple and modernise legacy Objective-C code, building new Swift features with unit tests from day one
Contributed to architectural discussions and code reviews, improving consistency and testability across a large shared codebase

work.summary: Map and routing company providing foundations for autonomous driving and urban mobility

highlights: Designed and maintained iOS CI-as-code release pipelines (JobDSL, Groovy, Ruby/Rake) for HERE WeGo — a globally distributed navigation app with a vast user base
iOS feature development (Objective-C) and delivery of a white-label HERE WeGo variant for automotive OEM partners, coordinating integration requirements across teams

work.summary: Internet-TV-as-a-Service platform for network operators, handling encoding, CMS, EPG and player delivery

highlights: Co-led the Platforms team; built iOS, web and SmartTV components (Obj-C, C#, JS) for Telenor MyTV, SKY Online and Telefónica

work.summary: Marketing agency pioneer in loyalty and incentive programs in Brazil

highlights: Full-stack development and batch integration APIs for Ticket Frete (C#, ASP.NET, SQL Server), a freight platform processing ~30k transactions/month

work.summary: System integrator focused on advanced technology solutions, Cisco Gold Partner in Brazil

highlights: Architect and developer for iOS, PocketPC, embedded and web platforms (C#, Java, Objective-C, C++); R&D prototypes and MVPs for enterprise clients including Braskem, Danone and Sirio-Libanês Hospital
Maintenance and development of Liberty Affinity (ASP.NET, SOAP, Oracle)

work.summary: Brazilian company specialised in agricultural and livestock data management software

highlights: Technical leadership, CI automation and agile process improvements for agricultural ERP products (VB, C#, PocketPC)
Desktop, web and mobile development (VB, C#, PocketPC, Palm OS)

skills.name: AI & Agentic Development
keywords: Process automation (Jira, GitHub, Notion/Markdown) via LLMs

projects.name: SwiftRex
projects.description: Open-source unidirectional dataflow (Redux) library for SwiftUI and UIKit, powered by Combine, RxSwift or ReactiveSwift

projects.name: Personal repositories
projects.description: FP, CombineWebSocket, CombineNFC, Runge-Kutta numerical method solver for Differential Equations (Calculus), FunctionalParser and many other projects

projects.name: Teufel repositories
projects.description: FoundationExtensions, UIExtensions and Combine wrappers for Bonjour, WAMP, LongPolling, CoreBluetooth and EAP async protocols
